_meta.note: PSDT-native pipeline. The `psdt` field can point at ANY URL — local repo path or Firebase Storage or CDN. Recommended: host large PSDT files in Firebase Storage under photo_templates/ to keep the git repo lean. ag-psd parses the PSDT client-side and auto-extracts Smart Object placement.
_meta.smartObjectName: Optional — restrict cover detection to layers containing this substring
_meta.smartObjectSkip: Optional — array of substrings; skip any smart object whose layer name OR any ancestor group name contains one
_meta.interiorPageText: Optional bool — if true, page-shaped slots (Left Page, Right Page, Back Page) get filled with the author's opening chapter text instead of being left as mockup defaults

templates.name: Front and Back Covers (Adobe Stock)
templates._notes: Two books (front + back angle). Auto-detects both [YOUR IMAGE HERE] slots and puts the author's cover on both.

templates.name: Book Mockups Set — Open Book (Adobe Stock)
templates._notes: Book Stack (front cover) + open book with Left/Right/Back Page. Author's cover goes on Book Stack; folio's opening chapter text renders into the page slots.
